title: Decked Out 2
description: Unofficial modpack that provides sound and texture support to TangoTek's Decked Out 2
body:
Very simple modpack with only a few mods, namely Fabric, SimpleVoiceChat, and AudioPlayer. These mods together with the Hermitcraft S9 Resource Pack provide full functionality to TangoTek's Decked Out 2 for you to enjoy on your world download. Decked Out 2 uses AudioPlayer, a mod built on top of Fabric and SimpleVoiceChat, to play custom audio while playing the game via customized music discs. Make sure all audio files are in your world download before playing, otherwise it will not work.

Discord: **[https://discord.gg/CKkQjxDaxN](https://discord.gg/CKkQjxDaxN)**

Server IP (No mods required): **decked.serv.onl**

**The server is fully functional with sounds in vanilla Minecraft 1.20/1.20.1, no mods required.** This is the easiest way to play Decked Out if you are interested. If you prefer to play in single-player, I would still recommend taking the modded route.

Carpet is also included in the modpack to provide functionality to the map that shows treasure, frost embers, clank and hazard block without the need for a second account logged in. Simply follow the guide provided by hermits, and use /player spawn TangoCam at the provided coords. This will spawn a player that will keep the map updating as you play the game

Decked Out 2 is a custom Minecraft dungeon-crawler and minigame built entirely in survival by TangoTek on the Hermitcraft server. The game requires the player to search the dungeon for their required 'artifact', which they must return to the start of the level to win the run. Using frost embers acquired from artifacts and throughout the dungeon, players can purchase cards for their deck which will provide benefits for  future runs.

 

For more information on TangoTek's Decked Out 2, check out the following links:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/aoVVCwx6k1w" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
[https://www.liontack.me/project/decked-out-2-info/](https://www.liontack.me/project/decked-out-2-info/)
[https://hermitcraft.fandom.com/wiki/Decked_Out_2](https://hermitcraft.fandom.com/wiki/Decked_Out_2)

To play Decked Out 2, you will need your own copy of the Hermitcraft Season 9 world download, which you can find here (only the java edition will work for this modpack): 
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=K7QXFbBHCX4
[https://hermitcraft.fandom.com/wiki/Map_Downloads](https://hermitcraft.fandom.com/wiki/Map_Downloads)
[https://hermitcraft.com/](https://hermitcraft.com/)

The modpack server uses an edited, expanded version of the Decked Out dungeon, which can be found here: 
[https://www.reddit.com/r/DeckedOut2/comments/18w0hgi/decked_out_co](https://www.reddit.com/r/DeckedOut2/comments/18w0hgi/decked_out_co)

The world download in this modpack also includes EnfeebleLight/Alfheim's Decked Out Manager datapack, which is also how the server runs sounds with no mods. Check it out here: 
[https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/decked-out-manager/](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/decked-out-manager/)

NOTE: The Decked Out 2 dungeon, game, map, and assets are all the creation of TangoTek. This modpack simply gives users a quick and easy way to make the game functional with minimal setup.
